description: Deepen packages/generative-media with any-to-any media generation pipeline, enhanced provenance (SynthID + C2PA), and object-level image editing. This extends the existing package with new modality transforms, watermarking, and editing capabilities.
steps: 1. Extend packages/generative-media/src/types.ts with new types: Modality enum covering all media types (text, image, video, audio, music, 3d), ModalityTransform interface defining source->target modality pairs, SynthIDConfig for watermarking options, ProvenanceManifest for full generation metadata, ObjectEditOperation (inpaint, outpaint, style-transfer, remove), ObjectSegment (detected region), and EditResult.

2. Create packages/generative-media/src/any-to-any/modality-router.ts - a ModalityRouter class that maps (sourceModality, targetModality) pairs to appropriate provider pipelines. Support all combinations listed in the task (text->image, text->video, text->music, text->3d, image->video, image->3d, image->text, video->text, audio->text). Use interface ModalityTransformProvider with method transform(input, options) -> GenerationResult.

3. Create packages/generative-media/src/any-to-any/transform-providers.ts - implementations for each modality pair: TextToImageTransform, TextToVideoTransform, TextToMusicTransform, TextTo3DTransform, ImageToVideoTransform, ImageTo3DTransform, ImageCaptionTransform, VideoSummaryTransform, AudioTranscriptionTransform. Each returns mock results following the existing makeResult pattern.

4. Create packages/generative-media/src/provenance/synthid-watermark.ts - SynthIDWatermarker class with methods: embedImage(imageBuffer, metadata) -> watermarked buffer, embedAudio(audioBuffer, metadata) -> watermarked buffer, detect(buffer, mediaType) -> { isWatermarked: boolean, confidence: number, metadata? }.

5. Extend packages/generative-media/src/provenance/c2pa-stamp.ts by adding a ProvenanceManager class that wraps both C2PAStamper and SynthIDWatermarker into a unified provenance API: createManifest(assetId, generationMeta) -> ProvenanceManifest, verifyAsset(assetId) -> VerificationResult with status (verified/unverified/tampered).

6. Create packages/generative-media/src/editing/object-editor.ts - ObjectLevelEditor class with methods: detectObjects(imageUri) -> ObjectSegment[], inpaint(imageUri, mask, prompt) -> EditResult, outpaint(imageUri, direction, size, prompt) -> EditResult, removeObject(imageUri, segmentId) -> EditResult, applyStyleToObject(imageUri, segmentId, style) -> EditResult.

7. Create packages/generative-media/src/editing/segmentation.ts - SegmentationEngine class wrapping object detection and segmentation with methods: segment(imageUri) -> ObjectSegment[], segmentWithPrompt(imageUri, textPrompt) -> ObjectSegment[] for text-guided selection.

8. Update packages/generative-media/src/index.ts to export all new modules: ModalityRouter, all transform providers, SynthIDWatermarker, ProvenanceManager, ObjectLevelEditor, SegmentationEngine, and all new types.
9. Create packages/generative-media/src/__tests__/modality-router.test.ts - test routing for each modality pair, fallback behavior, unsupported pair handling.
10. Create packages/generative-media/src/__tests__/provenance.test.ts - test SynthID embed/detect cycle, ProvenanceManager manifest creation and verification, tamper detection.
11. Create packages/generative-media/src/__tests__/object-editor.test.ts - test object detection, inpaint, outpaint, remove, style transfer operations.
12. Run typecheck and tests: source /root/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22 && cd packages/generative-media && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test
acceptance_criteria: All new types compile without errors in strict mode
ModalityRouter correctly routes all 9+ modality pairs to appropriate providers
SynthIDWatermarker embed/detect roundtrip succeeds for image and audio
ProvenanceManager creates manifests and verifies assets
ObjectLevelEditor performs all 4 editing operations returning EditResult
All new tests pass via vitest run
verification: source /root/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22 && cd /projects/sandbox/Quant-Ecosystem && pnpm typecheck --filter=@quant/generative-media
source /root/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22 && cd /projects/sandbox/Quant-Ecosystem && pnpm test --filter=@quant/generative-media
